title: ScotchBlue Multi-Surface Premium Masking Tape, Pack of 3, 48 mm x 41 m, Scotch Adhesive Blue Painters Tape, For Painting and Decorating, Indoor & Outdoor, Sticks Well, 70% PEFC
features: In 2025 Scotch Brand celebrates its 100 year anniversary of bringing your ideas to life; let’s create, fix and do MORE together for the NEXT 100 years
Clean removal up to 14 days after application
Can be used on multiple surfaces

Masking Tape product is made with PEFC certified paper, sourced from certified, renewable and responsibly managed forests; tape made with 45% renewable resources; paper made from 99% Bio based material; solvent free adhesive
Ideal for walls, ceilings, metal, wood and glass
description: From the manufacturer ScotchBlue Multi-Surface Premium Masking Tape ScotchBlue Multi-Surface Premium Masking Tape has a premium ScotchBlue backing and high adhesive quality, for professional results indoors and outdoors. It has medium adhesion with easy removal and no residue up to 14 days after application. TIPS Tape Application Tips : For great paint results make sure the surface is clean, dry and dust-free. Next, apply the tape onto the surface while pressing down firmly as you go. And lastly, let the tape set for about 30 to 60 minutes before painting. Tape Removal Tips : Wait until the paint is dry to the touch before removing the tape. CHOOSE THE RIGHT TAPE FOR YOUR PROJECT: Clean removal up to 14 days after application UV resistant Medium adhesion Can be used on multiple surfaces Professional results Highly versatile indoors and outdoors MULTI-SURFACE SHARP LINES DELICATE SURFACE EXTERIOR SURFACE ROUGH SURFACE Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 22,709 4.6 out of 5 stars 22,709 4.2 out of 5 stars 1,401 4.0 out of 5 stars 17 4.6 out of 5 stars 742 Price £4.86 £ 4 . 86 £3.75 £ 3 . 75 £7.50 £ 7 . 50 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £10.75 £ 10 . 75 Surface Multi-surface Multi-surface Surface-specific Surface-specific Surface-specific Indoor/Outdoor ✓ ✓ Indoor Outdoor ✓ Surface Type Use on smooth or lightly textured surfaces, walls, ceilings, metal, wood, glass Use on smooth or lightly textured surfaces, skirting boards, doors, windows, vinyl Use on smooth or lightly textured delicate surfaces, wallpaper, freshly painted walls, furniture Use on smooth or lightly textured exterior surfaces, painted wood, metal, PVC, glass Use on rough textured surfaces, concrete, crick, stucco, rough wood, lacquer coating Residue-free Removal 14 days Max 21 days Max 60 days Max 10 days Max 3 days Max Quality of results *** **** **** *** ** Adhesion Medium: 3 Medium: 3 Low: 2 High: 5 High: 5 Advanced Technology no data ✓ ✓ no data no data Sustainable Solvent free Solvent free Solvent free no data Natural Rubber HOW TO DO: Surface Prep & Tape Application CLEAN SURFACE The surface should be clean, dry and dust-free so the tape sticks properly. APPLY TAPE Lay tape onto the surface, pressing down as you go. Don’t stretch the tape, or it may lift or break. SECURE TAPE Press tape down firmly with a smooth edge, like a putty knife or credit card. LET TAPE SET Wait about 30 to 60 minutes before you begin painting. Proper Tape Removal WAIT Wait until the paint is dry to the touch before removing the tape. Check the paint can for the manufacturer's dry times. SCORE Use a putty knife or razor blade to score along the edge of the tape. This prevents paint from being pulled up with the tape and from cracking along the paint line TAPE Taking your time, lift up the painter’s tape and pull it back on itself, removing at a 45 degree angle. If adhesive sticks to the surface, try a 90-degree angle. DONE! You’ll get a sharp, clean line and a professional looking paint job!
